citation_label: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2012 (Act 4 of 2012) — Third Schedule rates substituted
heading: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2012 (Act 4 of 2012) — Third Schedule rates substituted

metadata.gazette_notification: Acts Supplement No. 2 to the Uganda Gazette No. 36 Volume CV, 12 October 2012
metadata.publisher: Uganda Printing and Publishing Corporation (UPPC), Entebbe
metadata.source_authority: Parliament of the Republic of Uganda
metadata.source_note: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2012 (Act 4 of 2012) from the Parliament of Uganda CMIS repository (scanned parliament-library print with the Clerk-to-Parliament authentication block; OCR at 300 dpi). Section 3 substitutes the Third Schedule rate tables of the Income Tax Act, Cap. 340 - the resident and non-resident individual rate structure in force from 1 July 2012 through FY2025/26 (deemed commencement per section 1; assent 26 September 2012). The later amendment chain does not touch the Part I rates: verified against the 2014-2024 assented prints held locally and the point-in-time consolidations at 2023-12-31 and 2024-12-23.
metadata.title: Income Tax (Amendment) Act, 2012 (Act 4 of 2012) — Third Schedule rates substituted

body: The Third Schedule to the principal Act is amended— (a) by substituting for Part I the following— “s. O(1). Part 1. Income tax rates for individuals. 1. ‘The income tax rates applicable to resident individuals are— Chargeable income Rate of tax | | Not exceeding Ushs 2,820,000 | Nil Exceeding Ushs. 2,820,000 but not) 10% of the amount by which ' exceeding Ushs. 4,020,000 ichargeable income exceeds Ushs. | | 2,820,000. \ | Exceeding Ushs. 4.020.000 but not] Ushs. {20,000 plus 20% of the amount exceeding shs. 4,920,000 by which chargeable income exceeds | Ushs. 4,020,000. | Exceeding Ushs. 4,920,000 ia) Ushs 300.000 plus 30% of the | amount by which chargeable | income exceeds Ushs. $920,000) | and | (b} where the chargeable income of| an individual exceeds | Ushs. 120,000,000 an additional 10% charged on the amount by} | which chargeable — income | | exceeds Ushs. 120,000,000. | a —-—... ne re 3 Act 4 Income Tax (Amendment) Act 2012 2. The income tax rates applicable to nonresident individuals are— ~ Chargeable income / Rate of tax 7 | Not exceeding Ushs. 4,020,000 10% - Exceeding Ushs. 4,020,000 but not}/Ushs. 402,000 ~ plus 20% of the exceeding Ushs. 4,920,000 amount by which chargeable income| exceeds Ushs. 4,020,000. { Exceeding Ushs.4.920,000 | (a) Ushs. 582.000 plus 30% of thel amount by which chargeable income exceeds Ushs. 4.920.000; and | (b) where the chargeable income of, an individual exceeds | Ushs. 120,000,000 an additional | | 10%: charged on the amount by which chargeable — income exceeds Ushs. 120,000,000, (b) in Part V— (i) paragraph (1) by inserting immediately after “118” the following— “excluding interest on government securitics” (ii) by inserting after paragraph (2) the following — (3) The withholding tax rate appin ctor interest payments on government seers. ca a resident person under section {17 is 20": (c) in Part VI by substituting for“: 560,000" ise fotiowing— “2,820,000” 4
